title: The Advance of Quraysh
description: Meanwhile Quraysh were advancing. They halted at al-Juhfah, where Juhaym b. al-Salt b. Makhramah b. al-Muttalib b. `Abd Manaf had a dream. He said, " I was between sleep and wakefulness when I had a dream. I saw a man coming on a horse. Then he stopped, and he had a camel with him. Then he said, "Utbah b. Rabi'ah, Shaybah b. Rabi'ah, Abu al-Hakam b. Hisham, Umayyah b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
